milestones.title: Architecture specification and integration contracts finalised
milestones.verification_criterion: Shared data representations, API contracts, and integration interfaces for all three pillars and the External Tool and API Orchestration Layer are documented, reviewed, and accepted by all pillar leads. Tool registry schema and API adapter interface specifications finalised. Integration test harness is operational.

milestones.title: Planning engine v1.0 — baseline neuro-symbolic integration
milestones.verification_criterion: Planning engine decomposes ≥5 benchmark task types into sub-task graphs with verifiable pre/post-conditions. End-to-end evaluation on ≥1 standardised agent benchmark showing measurable improvement over LLM-only baseline.

milestones.title: Memory architecture v1.0 — tri-store prototype operational
milestones.verification_criterion: Working, episodic, and semantic memory stores are individually operational with basic memory controller. Evaluation on synthetic long-horizon tasks (>20 steps) shows coherence improvement over context-window-only baseline.

milestones.title: Multi-agent protocol specification with convergence proofs
milestones.verification_criterion: Formal specification of task-delegation and negotiation protocols complete. Convergence proofs delivered for ≥3 core task classes. Simulation validation with ≥5 heterogeneous agents on synthetic coordination tasks.

milestones.title: Demonstrator use cases defined and domain data secured
milestones.verification_criterion: Clinical use cases, manufacturing scenarios, and logistics corridors are fully specified with acceptance criteria. Ethics approvals for clinical data access granted. Factory access agreement signed. Logistics data access terms agreed.

milestones.title: Integrated MAESTRO framework v1.0 with tool orchestration layer
milestones.verification_criterion: All three pillars and the External Tool and API Orchestration Layer integrated into a single framework. Tool registry populated with ≥10 tools/APIs. End-to-end evaluation on cross-cutting benchmarks demonstrates all three capabilities and tool orchestration operating together. Framework deployable in demonstrator environments.

milestones.title: Demonstrator v1.0 — initial deployment in all three demonstrator environments
milestones.verification_criterion: MAESTRO framework deployed in healthcare (call-aligned), manufacturing (call-aligned), and logistics (cross-sector transfer) demonstrator environments. External Tool and API Orchestration Layer operational with domain-specific adapters in each environment. Initial functional evaluation completed in each sector. Identified gaps documented for framework refinement.

milestones.title: Research pillar targets achieved
milestones.verification_criterion: OBJ-1 target met (≥40% plan success improvement). OBJ-2 target met (≥30% coherence improvement). OBJ-3 target met (≥25% joint task completion improvement). All results reproducible and documented.

milestones.title: Demonstrator validation complete — all demonstrator environments
milestones.verification_criterion: Healthcare demonstrator validated on 500 clinical cases (OBJ-4). Manufacturing demonstrator validated over 3-month operational period (OBJ-5). Logistics transfer demonstrator validated across 3 corridors (OBJ-6). Tool orchestration layer validated across all demonstrators with ≥30 tools/APIs registered (OBJ-8). Cross-demonstrator evaluation report completed. Architectural transferability mapping to in-vehicle autonomous driving completed.

milestones.title: Open-source release and platform contributions delivered
milestones.verification_criterion: MAESTRO framework released as open-source on GitHub. Benchmark suite published on AI-on-demand platform. Documentation and tutorials available. EDIH dissemination initiated in ≥3 hubs.

milestones.title: Project completion and final review
milestones.verification_criterion: All deliverables submitted. Final exploitation plans per partner delivered. TEF validation reports completed. Final review documentation compiled.
